goals.title: Implement actual PathFinder analyze result page to match docs/mockups...
goals.objective: Implement actual PathFinder analyze result page to match docs/mockups/competency_map_v2.html layout and docs/mockups/competency_map_v2_guide.md behavior while keeping personalized API-driven answers. Scope: frontend result page layout, personalized competency map and action planner, guide FAB/drawer, focused tests/build/desktop visual QA only. Constraints: preserve DESIGN.md no fake acceptance scores, use existing Vue/Vite patterns, no mobile QA per user.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser happy path: Playwright route-mocked /analyze/99 desktop page shows v2 stats row, two-column competency main grid, personalized competency/action content, opens guide FAB drawer, and has no fake acceptance/fit score heading.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/c001-browser-layout.txt plus desktop screenshots and cleanup receipt
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Browser happy path PASS: frontend analyze-flow targeted test passed in .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/green-layout-test-3.txt; desktop screenshots .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/screenshots/result-v2-desktop-top.png and result-v2-desktop-drawer.png; layout JSON .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/desktop-visual-qa.json; cleanup: killed Vite PID 2777

successCriteria.scenario: Edge/data quality: mocked personalized analysis data with strength/articulate/study competency_map and roadmap questions renders counts from data, answer guide text, follow-up list, and empty-safe labels without hardcoded robot/company content.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/c002-personalization.txt with Playwright assertions/build output and cleanup receipt
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Personalized data PASS: Playwright assertions prove mocked 쿠팡/백엔드 competency_map counts, API 성능 개선/시스템 설계 content, drawer guidance, and answer guide '문제, 구현, 검증 순서로 설명하세요.' render from API-driven data; artifacts green-layout-test-3.txt and desktop-visual-qa.json; cleanup: no extra runtime after C001 cleanup

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: frontend unit tests, targeted analyze-flow Playwright test, Vite build, and desktop visual QA screenshot pass after the layout change.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/c003-regression.txt with command transcripts, screenshot path, and cleanup receipt
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression PASS: frontend design verification passed, analyze-flow E2E 4 passed, Vite build passed in .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/evidence/frontend-design-test.txt frontend-analyze-flow.txt frontend-build.txt; llm_server pytest 29 passed in llm-server-tests.txt; git diff --check no whitespace errors, line-ending warnings only in git-diff-check.txt; cleanup: no long-running processes

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-app/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
